---
title: "Predictive Modeling of Average Temperature Using Climate Change Indicators"
author: "Julia Ngo, Giuseppe Salvatori, and Layan Alhafi"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

# Introduction
Write your introduction here.

# Methods
Describe your dataset and methods.

```{r}
library(readr)
climate <- read_csv("climate_change_dataset.csv", show_col_types=FALSE)
```

# Results
Write your results here.

# Discussion
Write your interpretation here.

# Conclusion
Write your conclusion here.
